1715510.name: Pollito & Xiang Xiang: Adventure in the Forest
1715510.description:
What if?... 

… the universe's most super-powered, giant, cute robot brothers decided to take a “relaxing vacation”?

"Vacation" is just a funny way of saying they crash-landed on a planet, their ship exploded into a thousand pieces... And to top it off, they lost their giant robot forms!

Pollito and Xiang Xiang: Adventure in the Forest is a semi-open world cooperative action adventure game for PC and consoles. You control two cute characters that you can switch between to use their unique abilities.

Explore a world full of surprises, help the adorable inhabitants of the planet, find and gather resources to improve your home, and get ready for a multitude of challenges while helping these adorable and super-powered brothers on a "vacation" that is far from relaxing.
